title: Extracting Customer Demographics from Survey Data
scenario: Extract customer demographics from a sample survey data set containing age, location, and purchase history. Output should include average age, top 3 locations with highest purchase frequency, and total revenue generated by customers under 30. The output should be formatted as a list with headers and should be limited to 200 words.
constraints: Must include top 3 locations with highest purchase frequency

evaluationCriteria.description: Judge checks if the output adheres to the specified constraints.
Judge checks if the output contains valid markdown syntax.
Judge checks if the extracted data is accurate and based on the provided survey data.
